LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall2_.label: Omni Phantom Wall
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall2_.description: A building that employs phase space folding technology. It is invisible to authorized personnel and an impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.\n\nCan freely modify access rules.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall2_Power.label: Omni Phantom Wall (With Cable)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall2_Power.description:
A building that employs phase space folding technology. It is invisible to authorized personnel and an impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.

Can freely modify access rules.
\With integrated cables.
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall2_PowerLight.label: Omni Phantom Wall (Self-Luminous With Cable)
LanguageData.OmniPhantomWall2_PowerLight.description:
A building that employs phase space folding technology. It is invisible to authorized personnel and an impenetrable barrier to unauthorized individuals and enemies.

Can freely modify access rules.

Self-illuminating with integrated cables.
